text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first step to becoming a Triple
Crown champion—the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio seems to have pre-race jitters for
once. She's clearly feeling the pressure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her nerves calm down after I give her
some advice. She leaves excitedly for the track,
ready to wow the crowd with her performance.
